description: A fictional character, role, or archetype within a narrative work.

name.description: The name or title of the character

role.description: The character's narrative function in the story

archetype.description: The archetypal pattern the character embodies, e.g. hero, mentor, trickster, shadow

traits.description: Distinguishing personality attributes, habits, or physical characteristics

motivation.description: The character's primary drive, goal, or desire that propels their actions

arc_description.description: A summary of the character's transformation or development throughout the narrative
